chapters.title: Empty Platform
chapters.content: Marcus missed the earlier train and waited alone for the last one home. The station was almost empty, except for one silent passenger.

chapters.title: Unfamiliar Face
chapters.content: During the ride, the stranger sat across from him without saying a word. Yet Marcus felt strangely certain he had seen that face before.

chapters.title: The Old Photograph
chapters.content: When he arrived home, Marcus found an old family photograph. The same stranger was standing there, taken more than thirty years ago.
